headline: Financial risk: Sector-wide regulatory disclosure tightening (BRSR/TCFD) if peer momentum accelerates
what_matters: BRSR, GRI, TCFD frameworks triggered; no new deadlines or penalties for Adani Power.
No P/E compression or margin erosion for Adani Power; sector uplift possible.
No direct cost of capital impact; potential for minor bond spread changes if disclosure lags.
